title: Trademark Licensing
metaDescription: Trademark registration and brand protection services in Vietnam through the National Office of Intellectual Property (NOIP).

hero.title: Trademark registration services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Secure exclusive rights to your brand and protect it from misuse — we manage the entire registration process through the National Office of Intellectual Property.

sections.heading: Protect your brand in Vietnam
body: A registered trademark gives your business exclusive rights to its name, logo and identity in Vietnam — and the legal standing to stop others from using it. InCorp Vietnam helps foreign-owned companies secure those rights by handling the full registration process through the National Office of Intellectual Property of Vietnam (NOIP).

From application examination and legal consultation through to certificate issuance, our advisors manage drafting, dossier assembly, agency representation and follow-up so you can protect your brand with confidence.

items.title: Exclusive Rights
items.desc: Gain exclusive rights to your trademark and stop others from using it without permission.

items.title: Brand Protection
items.desc: Keep your brand safe from misuse and avoid confusion with similar marks.

items.title: Priority Recognition
items.desc: Secure priority and national recognition, and defend your ownership claims.

items.title: Asset Value
items.desc: Boost your trademark's value, making it easier to secure loans and strengthening your reputation.

sections.heading: Our comprehensive service
items: Agency representation and follow-up with NOIP
Official document delivery and government portal updates

items.title: Form examination
items.desc: Formal review of your application, approximately 1 month.

items.title: Content examination
items.desc: Substantive examination, up to 9 months from publication.

items.title: Certificate issuance
items.desc: Certificate valid for 10 years and renewable indefinitely.

items.q: How long is a trademark protected?
items.a: A registered trademark is protected for 10 years and can be renewed indefinitely.

items.q: What types of trademarks can be registered?
items.a: Five categories are recognised, including ordinary marks, service marks, collective marks and certification marks.
Filing fees start at approximately US$190 per class, plus additional examination and publication fees.

sections.title: Ready to protect your brand in Vietnam?
sections.subtitle: Let our advisors secure your trademark and defend your intellectual property.
